title: Living in Boulder vlog 4 - 10 - 2017: Rode 25 miles, ran 4.32 miles, swam 400 meters

enrichment.summary: Kyle recaps his April 10, 2017 day in Boulder: a ~25-mile bike ride (commute to work plus a trip downtown to buy a phone belt at a running store), a 4.34-mile run, and a 400-meter swim. He covers audio troubles with his MP3 player while swimming, using fins without hand paddles, and plans to start daily body-shot photos to track his weight loss.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: harder than expected once he stopped relying on fins and actually pushed
needs music to stay motivated — Bible audio didn't work due to splashing
wants to do daily body-shot photos to visibly document getting slimmer
wants to bring a small tripod next time to film himself riding and running

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He recorded the video on April 11th, 2017 at 10 PM.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He planned to do body shots for the video.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He forgot to set up the computer on a table to show his whole torso.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: His commute to work was a 21-mile round trip.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He went to Aaron's place downtown.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He planned to go riding but ended up running instead.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He went to a swimming pool after running.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He couldn't hear his MP3 player while swimming due to splashing.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He lost motivation to swim without music.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He tried using another MP3 player with lower volume.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He used fins while swimming but forgot the paddle hand paddle.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He realized how hard swimming is when he started pushing down.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He forgot to bring a tripod to film himself running.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He plans to film himself running next time.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He thinks he looks fat on camera.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He will show how his appearance has changed in the next video.
